name: task4f-smoke-day3
description: Task 4f local LLM smoke test: Day 3 parent-reason mix.

slots.scenarioBrief: A harmless post about a fictional craft, cooking experiment, local hobby group or home project in an approved fictional town.
A nuisance promotional spam post with repetitive hype and low-value advertising, but no payment, credential, deposit or fake-verification request.
A fake account support or payment verification post that asks users to provide login details, password, 2FA/security code or payment-card verification through [link removed].
